meaning: n.联合者,统一者,使一致的人(或物)
examples: Herb is the unifier of the people.
In the production process, unifier ray and color of the original image is a very important role for image quality.
His reputation, though fading, as a peaceable Pushtun, a national unifier and, above all, as the likeliest guarantor of the foreigners’ shining promise to Afghanistan may best explain this.
Remember he came to town saying he wanted to be a unifier and not a divider.
Obama came across as statesmanlike, above the fray and very much a unifier.
